summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Jay Alminshawi cinematic portfolio. All 7 pytest backend tests pass (health, contact create+persist, validation 422 for bad email / missing fields / empty name, list endpoint). All 12 frontend feature checks pass: Navbar brand + CTA, Hero (title, overline, CTAs, laptop with City Civils screenshot), 8 project cards with all required category labels, 6 service cards, 3 testimonial cards with 5 star icons, About section with all uppercase keywords, Footer brand + social links + copyright. Smooth-scroll from navbar 'BUILD YOUR WEBSITE' to contact section works (5382px -> 20px). Contact form submits POST /api/contact and gets 201, success toast 'Message sent — I'll be in touch soon.' is shown, and the submission is persisted in MongoDB (verified via GET /api/contact).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') – consider migrating to lifespan context (non-blocking).
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which is permissive; acceptable for a public portfolio API but worth tightening in production.
No rate limiting on POST /api/contact – could be spammed; consider adding simple throttling or hCaptcha for production.
seed_data_creation: Inserted a few TEST_-prefixed contact submissions via pytest and one TEST_UI_ submission via Playwright. All visible via GET /api/contact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sections are stable and use data-testid attributes consistently. Contact form is wired to {REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/contact with sonner toast. Smooth-scroll uses scrollIntoView – allow ~1.2s wait after click. project-type field is a native <select>, not a text input – use select_option in Playwright.
